ground_truth.summary: DeclaredOnly->FlattenHierarchy fallback in TryGetValidatableProperty does not actually fix the AmbiguousMatchException and can silently drop validation attributes depending on which hierarchy level resolves.

human_threads.note: ilonatommy: managing flow by exceptions is not preferred; explore cheaper alternatives

ground_truth.caveat: production change is ~11 lines; the rest of the diff is tests
